user.title: Connect to Quilt
user.description: Enter the email address associated with your Quilt account. A one-time passcode will be sent to that address.

otp.title: Enter passcode
otp.description: Enter the one-time passcode sent to {email}.

home.title: Select home
home.description: Your account has {count} homes. Select the one you want to integrate.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Quilt
reauth_confirm.description: Your Quilt session for {email} has expired. Click submit to receive a new passcode.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Quilt
reconfigure.description: Update your Quilt email address or re-authenticate. A passcode will be sent to the email you provide.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Quilt cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid passcode. Please check the code and try again.
error.invalid_email: This email address is not registered with Quilt. Please check your email or sign up at the Quilt app.
error.otp_expired: This passcode has expired. Please request a new one.
error.network_error: Network error. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.api_error: An error occurred communicating with the Quilt cloud. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Quilt home is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Reconfiguration successful. Your integration has been updated.

init.title: Quilt options
init.description: Adjust settings for this Quilt home. The polling interval is a fallback used when the real-time stream is unavailable.

stream_degraded.title: Quilt real-time stream is degraded
stream_degraded.description: The Quilt cloud connection has experienced repeated errors. The integration is falling back to polling every 5 minutes. Check your internet connection or the Quilt cloud status. The issue will resolve automatically once the stream reconnects.
